title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Alex Imas and Phil Trammell on the economics of AGI, discussing optimal taxation and wealth redistribution, how non-AI-leader countries benefit from AI gains, and whether inequality is inevitable. The episode challenges intuitive assumptions about how AI's economic impact will be distributed.
